recommendations: mcp_fallback_without_retry: Before abandoning MCP tool after single failure, inspect the error field in the response and retry once with adjusted parameters — the fallback to 5-script Bash alternatives costs far more than a second MCP call

path_assumption_bias: Before Read on any path not confirmed earlier in the same unit, run ls on the parent directory; two consecutive failed Reads waste tool calls and context; a single ls would have revealed internal/ is a directory in 8d9169bc-5

write_overwrite_without_read: After Write, do a Read or at minimum a grep to verify content before issuing a second Write on the same file; consecutive Writes without verification indicate the file contents were composed in working memory rather than confirmed on disk

shell_tool_preference_violations: Pattern shows zero cross-session improvement across 7+ cycles; this suggests the correction is not being encoded in a load-bearing location; consider promoting a concrete rule to Tier-0 CLAUDE.md inline: 'never call grep or /usr/bin/grep via Bash; use Grep tool' — currently this lives in rules/shell.md (Tier-1 sub-file) which is clearly not being loaded reliably
